debug_info.goal:
M : Type u_1
k : Type u_4
inst✝² : AddCommMonoid M
inst✝¹ : Field k
inst✝ : IsAlgClosed k
I : Ideal (AddMonoidAlgebra k M)
G : Type u_1 := AddLocalization ⊤
left✝ : I.IsPrime
s : Set (M × M)
hsI :
  Ideal.span
      ((fun x =>
          @AddMonoidAlgebra.isToricIdeal_iff_exists_span_single_sub_single.match_1 M (fun x => AddMonoidAlgebra k M) x
            fun a b => single a 1 - single b 1) ''
        s) =
    I
V : Scheme := Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M ⧸ I, commRing := Ideal.Quotient.commRing I }
this✝ : V.Over (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing }) := sorry
this : (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k G, commRing := commRing }).Over
  (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing }) :=
  sorry
VinterT : Scheme :=
  pullback (V ↘ Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing })
    (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k G, commRing := commRing } ↘
      Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing })
⊢ ∃ s,
    @AddMonoidAlgebra.monoidIdeal M (AddLocalization ⊤) k inst✝² Algebra.GrothendieckAddGroup.instAddCommGroup
        (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤) s.toAddSubmonoid Field.toEuclideanDomain.toCommRing =
      I

failed_attempts: simp [monoidIdeal, hsI]

simp only [monoidIdeal, Subtype.val_eq_coe, Set.image_image]
    rw [hsI]
    apply Ideal.span_eq_of_le
    · intro x hx
      obtain ⟨a, b, hab, rfl⟩ := hx
      exact Submodule.sub_mem _ (single_mem a) (single_mem b)
    · intro x hx
      obtain ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ := hx
      obtain ⟨z, hz, rfl⟩ := hy
      exact ⟨z.1, z.2, hz, rfl⟩

simp only [monoidIdeal, AddSubmonoid.coe_toAddSubmonoid, Set.image_image]
    rw [hsI]
    congr
    ext x
    constructor <;> rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ <;> aesop
simp [monoidIdeal, hsI]
simp [monoidIdeal, hsI]

    · apply Ideal.span_le.mpr

    · intro x hx

simp only [monoidIdeal, AddSubmonoid.closure_eq_addSubgroup_closure, hsI]
    congr
    ext x
    constructor <;> rintro ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩ <;> aesop

simp only [monoidIdeal, Set.image_image]
    rw [hsI]
    apply Ideal.eq_of_le_of_le
    · apply Ideal.span_le.mpr
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩ := h
      clear h
      induction t using AddSubmonoid.closure_induction with
      | basic x hx =>
        obtain ⟨⟨c, d⟩, hc, rfl⟩ := hx
        exact Ideal.sub_mem _ (Ideal.mem_span_singleton_self _) (Ideal.mem_span_singleton_self _)
      | one => simp
      | mul x y hx hy ihx ihy => simp_all [sub_mul, mul_sub]
      | npow x n hx ih => simp_all [sub_pow]
    · apply Ideal.span_le.mpr
      rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, h, rfl⟩
      obtain ⟨t, ht, rfl⟩ := h
      clear h
      induction t using AddSubgroup.closure_induction with
      | basic x hx =>
        obtain ⟨u, hu, rfl⟩ := hx
        clear hx
        induction u using AddSubmonoid.closure_induction with
        | basic y hy =>
          obtain ⟨⟨c, d⟩, hc, rfl⟩ := hy
          exact Set.mem_image_of_mem _ hc
        | one => simp
        | mul x y hx hy ihx ihy => simp_all [sub_mul, mul_sub]
        | npow x n hx ih => simp_all [sub_pow]
      | neg x hx ih =>
        simp_all [sub_neg_eq_add, add_comm]
      | zero => simp
      | add x y hx hy ihx ihy => simp_all [sub_add_sub_cancel]

    · apply Ideal.span_le.mpr
